title: Glarks White Cable Tie Set - 360pcs Base & Zip Ties, 120pcs 3-6MM Saddle Type Mount Wire Holders, 6 Inch Self-Locking Cable Ties with Pan Head Screws
features: ♬ [Package Includes] You'll get 120pcs white cable tie bases which are 40pcs x 3mm, 40pcs x 4mm, 40pcs x 6mm, 120pcs pan head screws which are 40pcs x 3x12mm, 40pcs x 4x16mm, 40pcs x 5x16mm, and 120pcs black cable zip ties, total of 360pcs.

♬ [High-quality Material] Our saddle mount wire holders and cable zip ties are made of high-quality nylon, sturdy, durable, light-weight, also with excellent insulation aging function, which can be used for a long time and provide you with good use experience.

♬ [Easy to Use] Firstly, you need to fix wire holder to the wall with screws, insert the zip tie into the holes of holder to attach the cables or wires, and then tighten it. Finally you just need to cut off the excessive zip tie.

♬ [Wide Application] Cable tie base and mounting screws can work with zip ties to keep your USB cables, computer cables, electronic wires organized or fix all kinds of wire. Suitable for machine, automobile, television, air-conditioner, fridge, computer, etc.

♬ [Zip Ties] 120pcs nylon zip ties are included in the package, with good toughness, ability of fast binding and excellent corrosion resistance, and they can also be used individually to manage scattered wires well. Good helper to your life.
description: Glarks 360Pcs White Cable Tie Base and Cable Zip Ties with Mounting Screws Set, 120Pcs 3MM 4MM 6MM Saddle Type Mount Wire Holder and 120Pcs 6 Inch Self-Locking Cable Tie with 120Pcs Pan Head Screws Specifications: Product type: Cable Tie Base and Cable Zip Ties with Mounting Screws Set Product: cable tie base, cable zip tie, screw Material: nylon Holder size: 3mm, 4mm, 6mm Screw size: 3x12mm, 4x16mm, 5x16mm Zip tie size: 150mm(6”) Color: white Features: ❤ Perfect for machine, automobile, television, air-conditioner, fridge, computer, etc. ❤ 120pcs white cable tie bases and 120pcs pan head screws in different size are included in the package, also coming with 120pcs white cable zip ties, which can meet your various needs of daily use. ❤ Made of high-quality nylon, sturdy, durable, light-weight, also with excellent insulation aging function. Package list: 40pcs x 3mm cable tie bases 40pcs x 4mm cable tie bases 40pcs x 6mm cable tie bases 40pcs x 3x12mm pan head screws 40pcs x 4x16mm pan head screws 40pcs x 5x16mm pan head screws 120pcs x white cable zip ties Total quantity: 360pcs Note: There could be some deviations due to manual measurements or slight color difference as the result of photographing scene.
